name: WcagSuccessCriterion
description: A WCAG success criterion defining a testable requirement for accessible web content.

id.description: The WCAG success criterion identifier, e.g. 1.1.1

title.description: Short name of the success criterion

level.description: Conformance level of the success criterion

principle.description: The POUR principle the criterion belongs to

guideline.description: The guideline number the criterion belongs to

description.description: Full text of the success criterion requirement

url.description: URL to the official WCAG success criterion documentation

version.description: WCAG version that introduced this criterion

understanding.description: URL to the understanding document for this criterion

techniques.description: List of technique identifiers applicable to this criterion
